mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, avatar_url, nickname, gender, birthday, status, last_login_at, last_login_ip, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, avatar_url, nickname, gender, birthday, status, last_login_at, last_login_ip, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, avatar_url, nickname, gender, birthday, status, last_login_at, last_login_ip, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
